subject: Geography
title: Shackleton's Endurance
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Shackleton's Endurance.

hook.text: In 1915, Shackleton's ship Endurance was crushed by Antarctic ice. His crew was stranded.

buildup.text: They camped on drifting ice for months, then sailed lifeboats to desolate Elephant Island.

discovery.text: Shackleton then sailed 1,300 km across the world's roughest ocean in a 7-meter boat.

twist.text: He crossed uncharted mountains on foot to reach a whaling station and organized a rescue.

climax.text: All 27 crew members survived—one of the greatest survival stories ever told.

punchline.text: He lost his ship but saved every single life.

quiz.question: How many of Shackleton's crew survived the Endurance expedition?
